title: Faster MC
description: Plugin that tweaks the game to make it slightly faster to complete.
body:
FasterMC is a plugin for Minecraft Paper/Spigot 1.21+ which makes the game slightly faster to complete. This plugin is perfect for competitions which require speed.

Features:
- Right-clicking while holding one of these items in your off-hand and a compass in your main hand will locate a structure.
  - Coal -> Mineshaft
  - Diamond -> Buried Treasure
  - Emerald -> Village (Type of village depends on biome you are in to help with performance.)
  - Nether Bricks (block) -> Nether Fortess
  - Gold Block -> Bastion Remnant

![Compass Locating a Plains Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72f6b96a4aaa404553ea3b0b21fb5062f8334611.png)
  - All monsters have a chance of dropping a single/additional ender pearl when the monster(s) is killed.

![Ender Pearl Dropped From Blaze After Killing The Blaze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be47b7a34968a750b52e724e5e820ecd4968a5f3_0.webp)

All features are configurable; for example:
- Compass locating structures can be turned on or off.
- Specific structures for the compass can be turned on or off.
- Ender pearl drops from monsters can be turned on or off.
- The chance of an ender pearl dropping from monsters can be modified.
